title: Reinforcing element
abstract: There is provided a reinforcing element configured to be retrofitted to an existing structure comprising a slab and a corresponding supporting column, wherein the reinforcing element comprises a bracing member comprising a first portion configured to be attached to the slab and a second portion configured to be attached to the supporting column; and a collar clamped around the second portion of the bracing member and configured to extend around a perimeter of the supporting column.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A reinforcing element configured to be retrofitted to an existing structure comprising a slab and a corresponding supporting column, wherein the reinforcing element comprises: a bracing member comprising a first portion configured to be attached to the slab and a second portion configured to be attached to the supporting column; and a collar clamped around the second portion of the bracing member and configured to extend around a perimeter of the supporting column. 2. A reinforcing element according to claim 1, further comprising a plurality of bracing members, wherein the collar is clamped around the second portion of each bracing member. 3. A reinforcing element according to claim 2, wherein the first portion of at least one bracing member extends in a direction substantially opposite to the first portion of at least one other bracing member. 4. A reinforcing element according to claim 2 or claim 3, wherein an angle between the first portion of one bracing member and the first portion of an adjacent bracing member is equal to the angle between the first portion of each bracing member and the first portion of its adjacent bracing member. 5. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 2 to 4, wherein the reinforcing element comprises four bracing members and the first portion of each bracing member extends substantially perpendicularly to the first portion of an adjacent bracing member. 6. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 2 to 5, wherein the bracing members are connected at their respective second portions. 7. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 2 to 6 wherein each bracing member is equal in size and shape. 8. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 2 to 6 wherein each opposing pair of bracing members is equal in size and shape. 9. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 8, wherein the or each bracing member is formed from a laminate comprising at least two layers. io. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 9, wherein each bracing member is a discrete component configured to be individually attached to the existing structure. 11. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 10, wherein the bracing member comprises a fold line where the first portion of the bracing member meets the second portion of the bracing member. 12. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 11, wherein the first portion of the bracing member extends substantially perpendicularly to the second portion of the bracing member. 13. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 12, wherein the second portion of the bracing member comprises a free end remote from the first portion of the bracing member, and wherein the collar is disposed closer to the first portion of the bracing member than to the free end of the second portion. 14. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 13, wherein the collar comprises a continuous band of material. 15. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 14, wherein the collar comprises a width of less than 50% of a length of the second portion of the bracing member. 16. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 15, wherein the collar is adjustable such that the clamping force around the second portion of the bracing member can be adjusted. 17. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 16, wherein the bracing member is bonded to the slab and/ or to the supporting column by an adhesive and/ or a mechanical fastening means. 18. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 17, wherein the bracing member is made from a composite material comprising resin. 19. A reinforcing element according to claim 18, wherein the bracing member is made from carbon fibre reinforced polymer. 20. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 19, wherein the first portion of the bracing member comprises a larger surface area than the second portion of the bracing member. 21. A reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 20, wherein the bracing member is configured to be attached to the bottom of the slab. 22. An existing structure comprising a slab and a corresponding supporting column comprising the reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 21. 23. A method of retrofitting the reinforcing element according to any of claims 1 to 21 in an existing structure including a slab and a corresponding supporting column comprising: attaching the second portion of the bracing member to the supporting column; attaching the first portion of the bracing member to the slab; clamping the second portion of the bracing member with the collar disposed around a perimeter of the supporting column. 24. A method according to claim 23, wherein at least one of the attaching steps comprise bonding with an adhesive and/or a mechanical fastening means. 25. A method according to claim 23 or claim 24, wherein the reinforcing element comprises more than one bracing member and the collar is clamped around the second portion of each bracing member after they have been attached to the supporting column.
